title: iGEM 2018 Interlab Study Protocol: Calibration 1
author: Ylenia Longo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qncdvaw

steps.title: Add 100µl LUDOX solution into wells...
steps.instruction: Add 100µl LUDOX solution into wells A1,B1, C1 and D1 of a 96 well plate.

steps.title: Add 100µl ddH20 into wells A2,B2,C2...
steps.instruction: Add 100µl ddH20 into wells A2,B2,C2 and D2 of a 96 well plate.

steps.title: Measure absorbance at 600nm of all samples
steps.instruction: Measure absorbance at 600nm of all samples. Make sure to use the same measurement modes that will be used for the cell measurements.

steps.title: Import your data into the Excel...
steps.instruction: Import your data into the Excel sheet provided by iGEM (OD600 reference point tab)
